tools.name: search_documents
tools.description: Search the US Federal Register for regulations and notices. Filter by keyword, document type (rule, proposed_rule, notice, presidential_document), issuing agency (slug from the agencies tool), and publication date. Returns matching documents with title, type, agencies, abstract and links. Great for

tools.name: document
tools.description: Get full detail on a single Federal Register document by its document number (e.g. '2026-12811'): abstract, action, effective date, comment deadline, CFR references, citation, topics, agencies and links.

tools.name: recent_documents
tools.description: List the most recent Federal Register documents, optionally filtered by type and issuing agency, over a look-back window. Use this to monitor newly published rules/notices from an agency.

tools.name: executive_orders
tools.description: Search recent US presidential Executive Orders published in the Federal Register. Optionally filter by keyword and date. Returns EO number, signing/publication date, title and links.

tools.name: agencies
tools.description: Look up US federal agencies and their slugs (used to filter the other tools by issuing agency). Optionally pass a query to match by name, e.g. 'environmental' or 'defense'.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: document · Private data: search_documents, document, recent_documents · Public sink: search_documents.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: document · Private data: search_documents, document, recent_documents · Public sink: search_documents

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
